summary.en: TR EAEU 037/2016 is present and applies as the EAEU hazardous-substance restriction layer for in-scope electrical and electronic products, including power-tool systems and relevant accessories. Kazakhstan-bound files should include material control, supplier declarations, model mapping, exemption rationale where used, and EAC documentation coverage for the placed product.
summary.zh: TR EAEU 037/2016 是存在且适用的 EAEU 有害物质限制层，覆盖适用范围内的电气电子产品，包括电动工具系统及相关附件。哈萨克斯坦向文件应包括材料管控、供应商声明、型号映射、使用豁免时的理由以及投放产品的 EAC 文件覆盖。
summary.zht: TR EAEU 037/2016 是存在且適用的 EAEU 有害物質限制層，覆蓋適用範圍內的電氣電子產品，包括電動工具系統及相關附件。哈薩克斯坦向文件應包括材料管控、供應商聲明、型號映射、使用豁免時的理由以及投放產品的 EAC 文件覆蓋。

standards_or_laws: TR EAEU 037/2016 Restriction of the use of hazardous substances in electrical and radio-electronic products
EAC declaration or supporting conformity documentation for in-scope EEE
Material declarations and technical documentation for homogeneous materials

summary.en: China files may include China RoHS material declarations, GB 3883 or GB/T 3883 product files, and supplier substance statements. They should be reconciled with TR EAEU 037/2016 substance limits, model scope, exemptions, and EAC documentation wording.
summary.zh: 中国文件可能包括中国 RoHS 材料声明、GB 3883 或 GB/T 3883 产品文件及供应商物质声明。应将其与 TR EAEU 037/2016 的物质限值、型号范围、豁免及 EAC 文件措辞进行核对。
summary.zht: 中國文件可能包括中國 RoHS 材料聲明、GB 3883 或 GB/T 3883 產品文件及供應商物質聲明。應將其與 TR EAEU 037/2016 的物質限值、型號範圍、豁免及 EAC 文件措辭進行核對。

gap.en: The critical gap is not absence of an EAEU RoHS layer; it is present. The exporter must avoid treating China RoHS statements as automatic Kazakhstan proof and must map homogeneous-material evidence to TR EAEU 037/2016 and the actual EAC model family.
gap.zh: 关键差距不是 EAEU RoHS 层缺失；该层存在。出口商不得将中国 RoHS 声明视为哈萨克斯坦自动证明，而须把同质材料证据映射到 TR EAEU 037/2016 及实际 EAC 型号族。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距不是 EAEU RoHS 層缺失；該層存在。出口商不得將中國 RoHS 聲明視為哈薩克斯坦自動證明，而須把同質材料證據映射到 TR EAEU 037/2016 及實際 EAC 型號族。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for in-scope EAEU electrical and radio-electronic products; TR EAEU 037/2016 is present and must be addressed.
mandatory_status.cn: China RoHS and GB product files are useful evidence inputs but do not automatically satisfy TR EAEU 037/2016.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kazakhstan files should map restricted-substance evidence directly to TR EAEU 037/2016; marking the EAEU RoHS layer as absent would be incorrect.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哈萨克斯坦文件应将限用物质证据直接映射到 TR EAEU 037/2016；把 EAEU RoHS 层标为不存在是不正确的。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哈薩克斯坦文件應將限用物質證據直接映射到 TR EAEU 037/2016；把 EAEU RoHS 層標為不存在是不正確的。

summary.en: Cordless power tools need battery-level evidence in addition to tool-level EAC files. Lithium cells and battery packs should be supported by GOST IEC 62133-family safety evidence, transport papers, model traceability, charger compatibility review, and inclusion in the Kazakhstan or EAEU technical file where the battery is supplied with the tool.
summary.zh: 无绳电动工具除工具级 EAC 文件外，还需要电池层级证据。锂电芯和电池包应由 GOST IEC 62133 系列安全证据、运输文件、型号追溯、充电器兼容性复核以及随工具供应时纳入哈萨克斯坦或 EAEU 技术文件来支持。
summary.zht: 無繩電動工具除工具級 EAC 文件外，還需要電池層級證據。鋰電芯和電池包應由 GOST IEC 62133 系列安全證據、運輸文件、型號追溯、充電器相容性覆核以及隨工具供應時納入哈薩克斯坦或 EAEU 技術文件來支持。

standards_or_laws: GOST IEC 62133 family for rechargeable cells and batteries
TR CU 004/2011 for chargers and in-scope electrical equipment
TR CU 020/2011 for charger and battery-system EMC where applicable
TR EAEU 037/2016 for hazardous-substance restrictions in battery-powered EEE
Lithium-battery transport documentation for export logistics

summary.en: China battery-tool files often bundle the battery pack, charger, and tool under GB 3883 or GB/T 3883 plus China lithium-battery safety and transport documents. For Kazakhstan, the battery model, cell evidence, charger pairing, and kit configuration should be visible in the EAEU file.
summary.zh: 中国电池工具文件常把电池包、充电器和工具按 GB 3883 或 GB/T 3883 以及中国锂电安全和运输文件打包。面向哈萨克斯坦时，电池型号、电芯证据、充电器配对及套装配置应在 EAEU 文件中清晰呈现。
summary.zht: 中國電池工具文件常把電池包、充電器和工具按 GB 3883 或 GB/T 3883 以及中國鋰電安全和運輸文件打包。面向哈薩克斯坦時，電池型號、電芯證據、充電器配對及套裝配置應在 EAEU 文件中清晰呈現。

standards_or_laws: China lithium-battery safety and transport documents
CCC where applicable for chargers or covered accessories

gap.en: The frequent gap is selling corded and cordless variants under one tool certificate while omitting battery-pack model control, cell safety evidence, charger compatibility, and lithium logistics documents from the Kazakhstan shipment file.
gap.zh: 常见差距是用同一工具证书销售有线和无绳版本，却在哈萨克斯坦出货文件中遗漏电池包型号控制、电芯安全证据、充电器兼容性及锂电物流文件。
gap.zht: 常見差距是用同一工具證書銷售有線和無繩版本，卻在哈薩克斯坦出貨文件中遺漏電池包型號控制、電芯安全證據、充電器相容性及鋰電物流文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the battery, charger, or cordless kit is in scope of EAEU electrical, EMC, and hazardous-substance rules; GOST IEC 62133-family evidence is the expected battery safety support.
mandatory_status.cn: China battery and transport evidence must be tied to the exact exported battery, charger, and tool kit; it does not automatically complete the Kazakhstan EAEU file.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cordless tools are not Kazakhstan-ready until battery-pack models, GOST IEC 62133-family evidence, charger pairing, TR EAEU 037/2016 substance coverage, and lithium transport papers are aligned with the EAC file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在电池包型号、GOST IEC 62133 系列证据、充电器配对、TR EAEU 037/2016 物质覆盖及锂电运输文件与 EAC 文件一致前，无绳工具不能视为哈萨克斯坦就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在電池包型號、GOST IEC 62133 系列證據、充電器配對、TR EAEU 037/2016 物質覆蓋及鋰電運輸文件與 EAC 文件一致前，無繩工具不能視為哈薩克斯坦就緒。
